title: Rowboat apps registry record
description: One record per published app: maps the globally unique package name to the GitHub repository hosting it. Versions are GitHub Releases on that repository, not registry data.

name.description: Package identity. Globally unique and immutable once published; must equal the filename stem.

owner.description: GitHub login of the publisher. Must equal the PR author.

repo.description: Public GitHub repository hosting the app's releases, as owner/repo.

description.description: Short description shown in the catalog.

iconUrl.description: HTTPS URL of the catalog listing icon.
